Comment: THE GOAT! The course can be kinda difficult if you are a complete beginner to coding like me, but he is always available during office hours and is super helpful. Assignments can be kinda annoying and take a lot of time, so plan ahead. Pop quizzes are pretty common, and he offers extra credit if you do poorly. Overall, please take his class!!
Tags: EXTRA CREDIT, Beware of pop quizzes, Accessible outside class

Comment: He is a great professor, but if you are a complete beginner to coding this class is hard. It's really confusing no matter how many times he explains it. We used the Unity software for reference, if you're familiar with it, I definitely recommend the class. But if you were like me and not tech savvy and don't play video games, then it pretty hard
Tags: Beware of pop quizzes, Lecture heavy, Online Savvy

Comment: Great professor! Made concepts easy to understand through analogies and interactive activities. Assignments every couple of weeks based on the content learned in class to solidify understanding. Really nice guy too! You don't need a ton of coding background to be successful in this class since he teaches from the basics.

AMAZING PROFESSOR! I loved taking his class. The lectures are easy to understand and fun. He uses student engagement in his lectures through demos or games to keep everyone engaged. Projects were very straight forward and he is available to help during office hours. Overall great Prof. and a great class. I hope to take more classes with him!

Tags: Amazing lectures, Clear grading criteria, Accessible outside class

Comment: Professor Rudolph is great! His teaching style is very interactive. He makes lectures interesting and easy to follow. I learned a lot from this class. His grading criteria is very clear and he's always willing to help. He cares about student needs and one of the nicest professors I've ever had. 100% would take again and definitely recommend!
Tags: Amazing lectures, Clear grading criteria, Caring

Comment: Love Professor Rudolph. Great guy. Even if you don't know how to code, he starts from ground up so everyone is able to follow along and learn a lot. This class is pretty much just learning Unity game engine, so a lot of fun. There are project/assignments once every few weeks that are very manageable and he gives you class time to complete as well.
Tags: Clear grading criteria, Caring, Accessible outside class
